title.rendered: Shop for Good: 34 Online Stores That Benefit Nonprofits 🎁

content.rendered:
The National Retail Federation’s annual holiday forecast predicts retail sales in November and December will grow between 3.7% and 4.2% over 2024. By shopping at any of the 34 online stores listed below, socially conscious consumers can channel some of their spending power this holiday season into the nonprofit sector and the Greater Good. For those who prefer to donate money as gifts, consider purchasing a charity gift card from TisBest.org or GlobalGiving.org.

1) World Wildlife Fund Gifts :: gifts.wwf.org

Help create a safer world for wildlife and protect amazing places by purchasing a gift from WWF’s Gift Center.

2) UNICEF Market :: market.unicefusa.org

Proceeds go to the artisans who create the beautifully crafted products and to help UNICEF save and protect children worldwide.

3) To Write Love on Her Here Arms Store :: store.twloha.com

Shop the nonprofit TWLOHA store to support hope and help for people struggling with depression, addiction, self-injury, and suicide.

4) Ten Thousand Villages :: tenthousandvillages.com

Shop for unique, handmade gifts from around the world including fair trade baskets, jewelry, and crafts from artisans located in nearly 40 countries.

5) Sweet Relief Musicans Fund :: sweet-relief-musicians-fund.myshopify.com

Proceeds aid musicians and music industry workers who struggle with illness, disease, and age-related problems.

6) Survival Shop :: shop.survivalinternational.org

All profits go towards helping Survival International fight for the survival of tribal peoples worldwide.

7) Surfrider Foundation Store :: shop.surfrider.org

100% of profits help fund Surfrider’s mission to protect the world’s ocean, waves, and beaches. Products are sustainable and environmentally-friendly.

8) St. Jude Gift Shop :: giftshop.stjude.org

One-of-a-kind gifts designed to help St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital continue to treat and defeat childhood cancer and other deadly diseases.

9) Sierra Club Store :: store.sierraclub.org

All proceeds go towards helping the Sierra Club promote the responsible use of the earth’s ecosystems and resources.

10) SFMOMA Museum Store :: museumstore.sfmoma.org

The SFMOMA Museum Store offers the West Coast’s finest selection of modern and contemporary art books, as well as innovative design objects and furnishings, contemporary jewelry and apparel, toys, and posters and stationery.

11) Serrv International :: serrv.org

Serrv International is a nonprofit dedicated to fighting global poverty through fair and ethical trade.

12) PETA Shop :: shop.peta.org

All profits from merchandise sales go directly toward supporting PETA’s work for animals.

13) PBS Kids Shop :: shop.pbskids.org

From books and DVDs to toys and party supplies, playtime has never been more educational and fun.

14) Oceana Gift Center :: gift.oceana.org

Oceana’s Gift Center offers gifts and symbolic adoptions that help protect and restore the world’s oceans.

15) National Wildlife Federation Store :: shopnwf.org

Purchases of symbolic adoptions support the NWF’s mission to ensure wildlife thrives in a rapidly changing world.

16) NPR Shop :: shopnpr.org

Every purchase supports NPR programming by purchasing NPR-branded clothing, accessories, and gifts.

17) National Parks Conservation Association Store :: npca.org/campaigns/park-store

The NPCA offers supporters a great way to show their love for the national parks.

18) MoMa Design Store :: store.moma.org

Classic modern and cutting-edge design products for adults and kids, including items produced exclusively for the Museum of Modern Art (New York).

19) Human Rights Campaign Nonprofit Store :: shop.hrc.org

100% of net proceeds go directly to support the work of HRC to improve the lives of LGBTQ+ Americans.

20) Helping Rhinos Shop :: helpingrhinos.org/shop

All purchases help support vital conservation work to save critically endangered rhinos.

21) Heal the Bay :: shop.healthebay.org

Proceeds benefit Heal the Bay, a nonprofit dedicated to making the coastal waters and watersheds of Greater Los Angeles safe, healthy, and clean.

22) Global Goods Partners :: globalgoodspartners.org

Global Goods Partners have partnered with over 60 artisan groups in more than 20 countries throughout Asia, Africa, and the Americas to help bring to market the fair trade, handcrafted products they produce.

23) Getty Store :: shop.getty.edu

The Getty Store enhances knowledge and appreciation of the arts by providing unique, high-quality merchandise and books.

24) First Book Marketplace :: fbmarketplace.org

Proceeds benefit First Book, a nonprofit that provides new books and educational resources to schools and programs in low-income communities.

25) Field Museum Store :: store.fieldmuseum.org

The Field Museum Store offers gifts for those interested in science and cultural, natural, and human history.

26) Electronic Frontier Foundation Shop :: supporters.eff.org/shop

The Electronic Frontier Foundation is the leading nonprofit organization defending civil liberties in the digital world. Perfect gifts for the nonprofit techie!

27) Democracy Forward Webstore :: store.democracyforward.org

Gifts purchased through the Democracy Forward Webstore help advance democracy and social progress and are ideal for political activists.

28) DarkSky International Store :: bonfire.com/store/darksky

Proceeds benefit DarkSky International’s work to restore the nighttime environment and protects communities from the harmful effects of light pollution.

29) Best Friends Animal Society Store :: shop.bestfriends.org

Proceeds benefit the Best Friends Animal Society, a nonprofit working to end the killing in America’s animal shelters through adoption, spay and neuter education, and no-kill initiatives.

30) Audubon Society :: audubon.org/marketplace

Audubon Marketplace gifts are unique and play an important role in protecting our birds and butterflies.

31) Art Institute of Chicago Museum Shop :: shop.artic.edu

The Art Institute of Chicago Museum Shop sells unique and beautiful objects from around the world in support of the arts.

32) Animals Asia Shop :: shop.animalsasia.org

Proceeds benefit Animals Asia’s work to end bear bile farming and improve the welfare of animals in China and Vietnam.

33) Amnesty International Store :: shop.amnestyusa.org

Proceeds benefit Amnesty International, a nonprofit that works for the human rights of all people – no matter who they are or where they are.

34) ACLU Store :: shop.aclu.org

Proceeds benefit the American Civil Liberties Union, a nonprofit that works to defend the rights and liberties guaranteed by the Constitution and laws of the United States.

The 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program provides an honest, balanced approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2026 and onward. Customized for nonprofit professionals, this webinar series will expand your skill set, advance your career, and help transition your nonprofit into the age of AI.

By shopping these 34 online stores, socially conscious consumers can channel some of their spending power this holiday season into the nonprofit sector and the Greater Good.
